acceptance_criteria.text: Reviews agent creates useful reply drafts from review text/internal sources.
proof: src/services/agent_review_reply_analysis.py implements LLM-backed and fallback reply drafting.
tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py covers generic reviews runner output.

acceptance_criteria.text: Result includes manual review reasons, checklist, provenance, and LLM/fallback metadata.
proof: Unit tests cover generator and fallback paths.
Production smoke returned manual_review_reasons_count=3, analysis_source=gigachat, llm_analysis_used=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Reviews agent performs no publish/send/dispatch capability and stops at final approval.
proof: Runner test asserts no capability steps.

acceptance_criteria.text: Run review journal exposes human labels for reply drafts, manual review reasons, and publication state.
proof: Workspace journal output details include reply draft count, manual review reason count, and publication state.

acceptance_criteria.text: Local checks, production deploy, and targeted production API smoke pass.
proof: production reviews smoke passed and cleaned fixture.

known_gaps: Publishing provider integration is intentionally not implemented.
UI click-through for a reviews agent was not part of this backend-focused phase.
Server logs still show the previously known explicit GigaChat SSL verification workaround warning.
